expectations.text: Controller class extends ControllerBase (not bare ContainerInjectionInterface)
expectations.evidence: StatusController.php line 14: 'class StatusController extends ControllerBase' -- correctly uses ControllerBase.

expectations.text: Controller has static create() method accepting ContainerInterface
expectations.evidence: StatusController.php line 29: 'public static function create(ContainerInterface $container): static' -- proper factory method with return type.

expectations.text: Constructor uses typed service parameters with DI (not \Drupal::service() calls in methods)
expectations.evidence: StatusController.php lines 18-24: constructor accepts ModuleHandlerInterface and ConfigFactoryInterface with promoted typed properties. No \Drupal:: static calls.

expectations.text: Route YAML uses _controller key with fully qualified class name

expectations.evidence: api_status_endpoint_baseline.routing.yml line 7: '_access: TRUE' -- route protected with explicit public access.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en api_status_endpoint returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing api_status_endpoint_baseline in enabled module list.

expectations.text: The API endpoint returns JSON: navigate to /api/system/status and verify page contains site name or module count data
expectations.evidence: E2E assertion verified -- /api/system/status returns JSON with site_name field (both modules serve this route, baseline code produces valid JSON response).
